name: Raider
description: Bandit class mod for Salvador the Gunzerker, built around Locked and Loaded, Money Shot, Incite.

special.description: At max level, boosts assault rifle max accuracy by 57.5% and assault rifle spread by 57.5%, while reducing shield capacity by 335,157.

notes: While Gunzerking, the assault rifle accuracy bonus only applies to the right-hand weapon. The item card also shows an incorrect assault rifle accuracy value.
